summary: Tested promo code functionality for ShowMeLive.online. All 23 backend API tests passed. Frontend Admin Dashboard Promo Codes tab and CreateEvent page promo code input working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/admin/promo-codes requires admin authentication (401)
Backend: GET /api/admin/promo-codes returns list of promo codes (200)
Backend: POST /api/admin/promo-codes creates percentage discount code (200)
Backend: POST /api/admin/promo-codes creates fixed discount code (200)
Backend: POST /api/admin/promo-codes creates code with start and expiration dates (200)
Backend: POST /api/admin/promo-codes fails for duplicate code (400)
Backend: POST /api/admin/promo-codes fails for percentage > 100 (400)
Backend: PUT /api/admin/promo-codes/{id} updates promo code (200)
Backend: PUT /api/admin/promo-codes/{id} can toggle is_active (200)
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/promo-codes/{id} deletes promo code (200)
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/promo-codes/{id} returns 404 for non-existent code
Backend: POST /api/promo-codes/validate requires authentication (401)
Backend: POST /api/promo-codes/validate calculates percentage discount correctly
Backend: POST /api/promo-codes/validate calculates fixed discount correctly
Backend: POST /api/promo-codes/validate handles 100% discount (free)
Backend: POST /api/promo-codes/validate returns 404 for invalid code
Backend: POST /api/promo-codes/validate fails for inactive code (400)
Backend: POST /api/promo-codes/validate fails for expired code (400)
Backend: POST /api/promo-codes/validate fails for code not yet active (400)
Backend: POST /api/promo-codes/validate fails when max uses reached (400)
Backend: POST /api/promo-codes/validate fails for wrong purchase type (400)
Backend: POST /api/promo-codes/validate works for 'all' applies_to
Backend: POST /api/promo-codes/apply increments current_uses
Frontend: Admin Login page loads correctly
Frontend: Admin Dashboard loads after login
Frontend: Promo Codes tab displays correctly with table headers
Frontend: Create Promo Code form opens with all fields
Frontend: CreateEvent page loads for creator users
Frontend: Premium package selection shows promo code input
Frontend: Invalid promo code shows error toast
Frontend: Valid promo code shows success toast and discount breakdown
critical_code_review_comments: AdminLogin.jsx was missing data-testid attributes - added for testing
seed_data_creation: Created test promo code LAUNCH50 for UI testing, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Promo code system fully functional. Admin can create/update/delete promo codes with percentage or fixed discounts, max uses, and validity periods (start/expiration dates). CreateEvent page shows promo code input when Pro Mode is selected, validates codes, and displays discount breakdown.

features: Form with all fields (code, description, discount type, value, applies_to, max_uses, start_date, expiration_date)
Promo codes table with columns (Code, Discount, Applies To, Uses, Valid Period, Status, Actions)
Promo code input appears when Pro Mode selected
Discount breakdown shows original price, discount, final price
